Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. The ideal repellent for hard-to-reach areas without mains power, providing continuous ultrasonic protection for up to three months. This rat trap kit effectively controls rodent infestations indoors and out. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Compact, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid to help protect children and pets from contact with bait (not included). Designed for use with all types of bait. Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
